tasks.title: Redact job error messages before storing and surfacing
evidence: internal/jobs/job_run.go updateStatusWithTimeout stores err.Error() into job status via UpdateStatus.
internal/cli/common/results.go waitForJob formats job.Error directly into apperrors.Internal messages.
internal/mcp/server.go waitForJob builds fmt.Errorf("job failed: %s", job.Error) without redaction.
plan: Redact job error strings with apperrors.SafeMessage before persisting to job.Error.
Update CLI/MCP waitForJob error construction to use sanitized job.Error values.
Add tests that assert secrets/paths are redacted in stored and surfaced job errors.

tasks.title: Fix MCP waitForJob timeout=0 semantics and status constants
evidence: internal/mcp/server.go waitForJob uses time.After(time.Duration(timeoutSeconds)*time.Second) with no guard for timeoutSeconds==0.
internal/validate/validate.go ValidateTimeout treats 0 as valid default, so timeout=0 can reach waitForJob.
internal/mcp/server.go waitForJob compares status strings "succeeded"/"failed" instead of model.Status constants.
plan: Treat timeoutSeconds <= 0 as no timeout (skip time.After, rely on context cancellation).
Switch waitForJob status comparisons to model.StatusSucceeded/StatusFailed constants.
Add tests for timeoutSeconds=0 and ensure existing waitForJob tests still pass.

tasks.title: Align JobSpec.Validate with validate.ValidateJob semantics
evidence: internal/jobs/spec.go Validate rejects TimeoutSeconds <= 0 and does not validate MaxDepth/MaxPages/URLs beyond presence.
internal/validate/request.go documents "0 means default" for MaxDepth/MaxPages/Timeout and validates URL formats.
internal/cli/scrape/scrape.go runs validate.ValidateJob before CreateJob, so --timeout 0 passes validation but CreateJob fails.
plan: Update JobSpec.Validate to use validate.ValidateJob-style rules (0 allowed, validate maxDepth/maxPages/URLs).
Remove timeout>0 hard check or make it consistent with defaulting behavior.
Add/adjust tests to cover timeout=0, invalid maxDepth/maxPages, and invalid URLs.

tasks.title: Normalize MCP tool errors to apperrors kinds
evidence: internal/mcp/server.go job_export returns fmt.Errorf("job not found")/"failed to read result file"/"failed to export job".
internal/mcp/server.go default case returns fmt.Errorf("unknown tool: %s").
plan: Classify job_export errors with apperrors.NotFound/Validation/Internal as appropriate.
Classify unknown tool errors with apperrors.Validation or apperrors.NotFound per MCP contract.
Update MCP tests to assert error kinds and messages are stable.

tasks.title: Use apperrors for store parse/prepare failures
evidence: internal/store/store.go returns fmt.Errorf for created_at/updated_at parse failures and params unmarshal errors.
internal/store/store.go returns fmt.Errorf for prepare statement failures in Open.
plan: Wrap store failures with apperrors.Internal (and preserve original error via Wrap).
Ensure user-facing surfaces use apperrors.SafeMessage for logging where needed.
Update store tests to assert error kinds for parse and prepare failures.

tasks.title: Classify scheduler errors with apperrors
evidence: internal/scheduler/scheduler.go returns fmt.Errorf for file watcher creation and schedule load failures.
internal/scheduler/scheduler.go enqueue wraps auth resolution with fmt.Errorf("failed to resolve auth").
plan: Replace fmt.Errorf with apperrors.Wrap/Validation/Internal as appropriate.
Add tests for scheduler error kinds (watcher failure, auth resolution failure).
Ensure scheduler callers surface apperrors.SafeMessage where needed.

tasks.title: Use apperrors for auth profile merge errors
evidence: internal/auth/merge.go returns errors.New("profile name is required") and fmt.Errorf for cycle/not found cases.
plan: Replace raw errors with apperrors.Validation for invalid input and apperrors.NotFound for missing profiles.
Wrap cycle detection errors with apperrors.Validation or apperrors.Internal per desired API behavior.
Update auth merge tests to assert error kinds and messages.

tasks.title: Classify scrape output pipeline errors
evidence: internal/scrape/scrape.go applyScrapeOutputPipeline returns fmt.Errorf for marshal errors and pipeline output type mismatches.
plan: Wrap marshal/type mismatch errors with apperrors.Internal and safe messages.
Add tests for pipeline output type mismatch behavior.
Ensure callers propagate the classified errors correctly.

tasks.title: Classify research output pipeline errors and handle marshal failures
evidence: internal/research/research.go applyResearchOutputPipeline ignores json.Marshal errors (raw, _ := json.Marshal(result)).
internal/research/research.go returns fmt.Errorf for pipeline output type mismatch.
plan: Check and handle json.Marshal errors, returning apperrors.Internal with safe message.
Wrap output type mismatch with apperrors.Internal.
Add tests covering marshal failure path and type mismatch.

tasks.title: Add tests for internal/cli/common helpers
evidence: internal/cli/common contains auth/flags/helpers but no *_test.go files.
plan: Add unit tests for StringSliceFlag.ToMap parsing and header/cookie parsing.
Add tests for BuildTokens and ParseTokenKind edge cases.
Ensure tests cover failure/empty input handling.

tasks.title: Add tests for CLI scrape/crawl/research commands
evidence: internal/cli/scrape contains command handlers but no *_test.go files.
plan: Add tests that exercise flag parsing and required-argument validation.
Cover error paths for invalid extract config and validation failures.
Use temp dirs/mocks for store/manager dependencies as needed.

tasks.title: Add --help + examples (and docstring) to scripts/strip_openapi_todos.test.mjs
evidence: scripts/strip_openapi_todos.test.mjs has a shebang and is executable but does not implement --help or usage output.
scripts/strip_openapi_todos.test.mjs lacks a top-of-file docstring describing its purpose and non-goals.
plan: Add a module docstring describing the test runner's responsibility, non-goals, and assumptions.
Implement --help/-h output with usage and examples (or drop executable bit if it's not meant to be run directly).
Add a small smoke test to ensure --help exits successfully.

tasks.title: Wire strip_openapi_todos script tests into CI
evidence: Makefile test/test-ci targets only run go test and web tests; scripts/strip_openapi_todos.test.mjs is not invoked.
web/package.json has no script that runs scripts/strip_openapi_todos.test.mjs.
plan: Add a script target (pnpm or Makefile) to run scripts/strip_openapi_todos.test.mjs.
Ensure make test and make test-ci include the script test without adding long-running steps.
Update docs if a new command is added.

tasks.title: Add module docstrings to apperrors files
evidence: internal/apperrors/apperrors.go begins with `package apperrors` and has no file-level docstring.
internal/apperrors/sanitize.go and internal/apperrors/sentinels.go also start with package declarations without docstrings.
plan: Add top-of-file docstrings describing responsibilities, non-goals, and invariants.
Ensure docstrings align with AGENTS.md requirements for every code file.
Run gofmt/formatters after updates.

tasks.title: Add module docstrings to jobs and manage CLI files
evidence: internal/jobs/job_create.go, job_run.go, and helpers.go start with package declarations without file-level docstrings.
internal/cli/manage/pipeline_js_mgmt.go and render_profiles.go start with package declarations without docstrings.
plan: Add file docstrings documenting responsibility, non-goals, and invariants for each listed file.
Keep docstrings concise and aligned with AGENTS.md expectations.
Run gofmt if needed.
